order_confirmation.name: Order Confirmation
order_confirmation.template: Dear {customer_name}, Thank you for your order #{order_id} at Shatsheeri! Amount: ৳{total}. We will process it soon. Visit: shatsheeri.com

order_processing.name: Order Processing
order_processing.template: Dear {customer_name}, Your order #{order_id} at Shatsheeri is now being processed. We will ship it soon. Thank you for your patience!

order_shipped.name: Order Shipped
order_shipped.template: Dear {customer_name}, Great news! Your order #{order_id} from Shatsheeri has been shipped. Expected delivery in 2-3 business days.

order_delivered.name: Order Delivered
order_delivered.template: Dear {customer_name}, Your order #{order_id} from Shatsheeri has been delivered! Thank you for shopping with us. We hope you love your jewelry!

order_cancelled.name: Order Cancelled
order_cancelled.template: Dear {customer_name}, Your order #{order_id} at Shatsheeri has been cancelled. Amount ৳{total} will be refunded within 3-5 business days.

payment_reminder.name: Payment Reminder
payment_reminder.template: Dear {customer_name}, Reminder: Your order #{order_id} at Shatsheeri (৳{total}) is pending payment. Please complete payment within 24 hours.

welcome_sms.name: Welcome SMS
welcome_sms.template: Welcome to Shatsheeri, {customer_name}! Get 10% off on your first order. Use code: WELCOME10. Shop now: shatsheeri.com

abandoned_cart.name: Abandoned Cart
abandoned_cart.template: Hi {customer_name}, You left items worth ৳{cart_total} in your cart at Shatsheeri! Complete your order now for express delivery.

festival_offer.name: Festival Offer
festival_offer.template: 🎉 Eid/Puja Special Offer! Up to 30% off on all jewelry at Shatsheeri. Limited time only! Shop now: shatsheeri.com/festival

feedback_request.name: Feedback Request
feedback_request.template: Dear {customer_name}, How was your shopping experience at Shatsheeri? Please share your feedback: shatsheeri.com/review/{order_id}
